original_selected_pddl:
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b6 on b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b9 on b8 on b7
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    ;; Tower 5 (height 4): b13 on b12 on b11 on b10
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted (height 1): b1 (unchanged)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on b3, b3 on table
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on b5 on b6, b6 on table
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b7 on b8 on b9, b9 on table
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b10 on b11 on b12 on b13, b13 on table
      (on-table b13)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
    )
  )
)

original_selected_pddl:
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17)
  (:init
    (arm-empty)
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1) (clear b1)
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2) (clear b2)
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b4 on b3
    (on-table b3) (on b4 b3) (clear b4)
    ;; Tower 4 (height 5): b9 on b8 on b7 on b6 on b5
    (on-table b5) (on b6 b5) (on b7 b6) (on b8 b7) (on b9 b8) (clear b9)
    ;; Tower 5 (height 8): b17 on b16 on ... on b10
    (on-table b10) (on b11 b10) (on b12 b11) (on b13 b12) (on b14 b13) (on b15 b14) (on b16 b15) (on b17 b16) (clear b17)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 (height 1) - unchanged
      (on-table b1) (clear b1)
      ;; Tower 2 (height 1) - unchanged
      (on-table b2) (clear b2)
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on b4, b4 on table
      (on-table b4) (on b3 b4) (clear b3)
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b5 on b6 on b7 on b8 on b9
      (on-table b9) (on b8 b9) (on b7 b8) (on b6 b7) (on b5 b6) (clear b5)
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b10 on b11 on ... on b17
      (on-table b17) (on b16 b17) (on b15 b16) (on b14 b15) (on b13 b14) (on b12 b13) (on b11 b12) (on b10 b11) (clear b10)
    )
  )
)

original_selected_pddl:
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19)
  (:init
    ; Tower 1: single block (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ; Tower 2: single block (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ; Tower 3: height 4 (b3 on table, b4 on b3, b5 on b4, b6 on top)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ; Tower 4: height 4 (b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8, b10 on top)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ; Tower 5: height 9 (b11 on table, b12 on b11, ..., b19 on top)
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (clear b19)
    
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ; Tower 1: single block stays the same
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ; Tower 2: single block stays the same
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ; Tower 3 inverted: b6 on table, b5 on b6, b4 on b5, b3 on top
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ; Tower 4 inverted: b10 on table, b9 on b10, b8 on b9, b7 on top
      (on-table b10)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ; Tower 5 inverted: b19 on table, b18 on b19, ..., b11 on top
      (on-table b19)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (clear b11)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem gripper-task)
  (:domain gripper-strips)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects
    rooma roomb roomc roomd roome - object
    ball1 ball2 ball3 ball4 ball5 ball6 ball7 - object
    left right gripper3 gripper4 gripper5 - object
  )
  (:init
    (room rooma)

Looking at this problem, I need to carefully interpret the "juggle" / "shifted by one" requirement.

Initial state: ball1 in gripper1, ball2 in gripper2, ball3 in gripper3.

"Shifted by one" means each ball moves to the next gripper in a cyclic rotation. So:
- gripper1's ball (ball1) → gripper2
- gripper2's ball (ball2) → gripper3  
- gripper3's ball (ball3) → gripper1

The candidate has this exact mapping already. Let me also check the objects syntax - the candidate uses typed syntax `- object` which violates the convention of untyped objects.

Let me also verify the remaining balls (ball4, ball5, ball6) should stay in room1, which matches.

The main issue is the typed object declarations using `- object`. I need to use a flat untyped `:objects` list.
